headline: Freeport McMoRan Board Change May Reshape Governance And Valuation Gap
summary: Freeport McMoRan (NYSE:FCX) has announced that Board member Robert W. Dudley will not stand for re election when his current term ends. Dudley is expected to step down following the company’s 2026 annual meeting of shareholders. The change affects the composition of the Board of Directors, which oversees corporate governance and high level policy. For you as an investor, this matters because Board composition plays a central role in how a company is overseen and how major decisions are...
